seoTitle: Floreat vs Forest Grove — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Floreat and Forest Grove. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Floreat vs Forest Grove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Floreat and Forest Grove.
heading: Floreat vs Forest Grove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Floreat, Western Australia and Forest Grove, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Forest Grove has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Floreat (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Floreat or Forest Grove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Floreat has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Forest Grove scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Floreat scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Forest Grove scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Floreat or Forest Grove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Forest Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
